headline: Kinder Morgan’s Western Gateway Pipeline Shifts Southwest Fuel Supply Story
summary: Kinder Morgan (NYSE:KMI) and Phillips 66 have advanced the Western Gateway Pipeline project after securing long term shipper commitments. The project is designed to serve refined product supply needs in the Southwest and California markets, including Arizona and California. This milestone reflects plans to adjust fuel distribution routes in response to refinery closures and evolving demand patterns in the region. Kinder Morgan operates a large network of energy infrastructure, and the...
